reviews.comment:
Pasas por muchas estaciones durante un viaje de 1500 km , pero en esta Nunca...pero NUNCA.... Funciona el poder para poder pagar con débito.... Cada vez que pase por aquí es la misma historia..... " Dejo de funcionar anoche"....

(Translated by Google)
You pass through many stations during a 1500 km trip, but at this one, the debit card terminal never works... but NEVER.... Every time I pass through here it's the same story... "It stopped working last night"...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTNHFQWElBEAE

reviews.comment:
